message.content:
#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(size: 11pt)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Aligned Mathematical Structures] \
  Source-backed grouped formula sample
])

= Expressions

#par(hanging-indent: 0pt)[*Expression 1.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$ M^a_(0c) M^c_(0b) = (M_0^2)^a_b = mat(delim: "(", -alpha'/2 [A_mu, A_nu] psi^mu psi^nu + overline(T) T, -i sqrt(alpha') (overline(T) A'_mu - A_mu overline(T)) psi^mu; -i sqrt(alpha') (T A_mu - A'_mu T) psi^mu, -alpha'/2 [A_mu', A'_nu] psi^mu psi^nu + T overline(T)) . $

#par(hanging-indent: 0pt)[*Expression 2.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$
  &||r_h^+ u - r_h u||_(0,2)^2 = a_h^+(r_h^+ u - r_h u, w) \
  &= a_h^+(r_h^+ u - r_h u, w - w_h^+) + a_h^+(r_h^+ u - r_h u, w_h^+) \
  &= a_h^+(r_h^+ u - r_h u, w - w_h^+) + a_h^+(u - r_h u, w_h^+) \
  &= a_h^+(r_h^+ u - r_h u, w - w_h^+) + a_h^+(u - r_h u, w_h^+ - w_h) \
  &quad + a_h^+(u - r_h u, w_h) - a_h(u - r_h u, w_h) \
  &=: T_1 + T_2 + T_3,
$

#par(hanging-indent: 0pt)[*Expression 3.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$
  &sum_(n=1)^infinity c_(1,n) T_1^n({x_tau^0}_(tau=1)^r) equiv sum_(n=1)^infinity c_(1,n) T_1^n({x_tau^0 tilde(f)_0^n}_(tau=1)^r) , \
  &sum_(n=1)^infinity c_(2,n) T_2^n({x_theta^0}_(theta=r+1)^(r+s)) equiv sum_(n=1)^infinity c_(2,n) T_2^n({x_theta^0 tilde(f)_0^n}_(theta=r+1)^(r+s)).
$

#par(hanging-indent: 0pt)[*Expression 4.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$
  &||psi_(n,t)(b)^* psi_(n,t)(b) + (psi_(n,e)(c) + alpha 1_(k_n))^* (psi_(n,e)(c) + alpha 1_(k_n)) - ||b||^2 1_(k_n)|| \
  &quad <= ||psi_(n,t)(b)^* psi_(n,t)(b) - psi_(n,e)(b^* b)|| + ||psi_(n,e)(c)^* psi_(n,e)(c) - psi_(n,e)(c^* c)|| \
  &quad = ||psi_(n,t^(-1))(b^*) psi_(n,t)(b) - psi_(n,e)(b^* b)|| + ||psi_(n,e)(c^*) psi_(n,e)(c) - psi_(n,e)(c^* c)|| < 2 epsilon_n
$

#par(hanging-indent: 0pt)[*Expression 5.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.]

$
  &" (i) " B = B_1 union B_2, tilde(B) = E_1 union E_2 " and " omega(E_i) >= 1/2 omega(tilde(B)), i=1,2; \
  &" (ii) " b(x) - b(y) " does not change sign for all " (x,y) in B_i times E_i, i=1,2; \
  &" (iii) " |b(x) - m_b(tilde(B))| <= |b(x) - b(y)| " for all " (x,y) in B_i times E_i, i=1,2.
$
